articles.author: Mark Kennedy
articles.title: Padma Lakshmi finds a new competitive kitchen with CBS’ ‘America’s Culinary Cup’ - AP News
articles.description: Padma Lakshmi is back with a new cooking competition, “America's Culinary Cup,” on CBS. The show offers the largest cash prize in culinary TV history at $1 million. It airs after “Survivor” on Wednesdays and streams on Paramount+. Unlike “Top Chef,” this show…
articles.content:
NEW YORK (AP) Padma Lakshmi is back in the kitchen with a knives-out cooking competition, and this time the stakes are higher for the contestants and for her.
The former host of Bravos Top Chef land… [+5163 chars]
